messages.content: rewrite my summary: Experienced early childhood educator with a Bachelor’s degree in Early Childhood Education and five years of professional experience teaching and creating educational content. Passionate about working with children and good team player, seeking a part time preschool teacher position.

I am an experienced early childhood educator who holds a Bachelor's degree in Early Childhood Education and has five years of professional experience in teaching and creating educational content. I am extremely passionate about working with children and value being a collaborative team player. Currently, I am seeking a part-time position as a preschool teacher.

help me with my cover letter:  I'm applying for Online Instructor Chinese Mandarin teacher, with a bacheor's degree in early childhood education and  5 years in educational field, I just moved to Seattle  at beginning of this year from china, I had one on one tutor experience and I'm patient

[Your Name]
[Your Address]
[City, State, ZIP Code]
[Email Address]
[Phone Number]
[Current Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Job Title]
[Company Name]
[Company Address]
[City, State, ZIP Code]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to express my interest in the position of Online Instructor Chinese Mandarin teacher at [Company Name]. With a bachelor's degree in Early Childhood Education and five years of experience in the educational field, I am confident in my ability to make a positive impact on students' language learning journeys.

Having recently relocated to Seattle from China earlier this year, I bring an authentic and immersive understanding of the Chinese language and culture to the classroom. My personal experience as a Chinese native speaker adds a unique perspective that enhances the learning environment for students. Moreover, my one-on-one tutor experience has allowed me to develop strong communication and instructional skills, ensuring effective teaching and meaningful student engagement.

One of my greatest strengths is my patience. I believe that all students possess different learning styles and paces, and as an educator, it is crucial to adapt and tailor my teaching methods to meet their individual needs. I pride myself on creating a supportive and inclusive environment conducive to continuous growth and development.

Additionally, my background in early childhood education has equipped me with a solid foundation in child development theories and practices. I am skilled at designing engaging and age-appropriate lesson plans that foster a love for learning in young students. My passion for education and dedication to nurturing young learners align perfectly with the vision and values of [Company Name].

I am particularly drawn to [Company Name]'s commitment to providing high-quality online language learning experiences. I admire the emphasis placed on fostering cultural understanding and global connections through language education. As an enthusiastic and adaptable educator, I am eager to contribute to [Company Name]'s mission and make a meaningful difference in students' lives.

Thank you for considering my application. I have attached my resume for your review, which provides further details on my qualifications and experiences. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my expertise aligns with your requirements and the vision of your organization. Please feel free to contact me at your convenience to arrange a call or an interview.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

help me write my answer :• How does this position fit into your life currently? 
I moved to the states at the beginning of this year, and I worked as a preschool teacher at our beginning in July ,the I decided to go back to school during my time there , so currently I’m looking for a part- time position as a preschool teacher.

• What draws you to teach in a school like NKS? 

It really attracts me that NKS uses Reggio Emilia teaching approach, it gives preschoolers a lot of choices to explore what they are interested in, my previous School is also a Reggio Emilia inspiring school where I was able to choose our own topics with my kids, making projects that last a long time, it was a accomplishment

• What do you like best about working with the elementary school age range?
elementary kids are energetic, they also keep my energy level high, 

• What do you like best about working with the preschool school age range?

They are full of curiosity and imagination , I feel like I’m learning with preschoolers together in my class,  we always celebrate little success everyday, and they show me their purest love.

• What pay rate do you hope to earn for this position? 
My expected pay is 23/ hour

• When would you be available to start?
I’m available to start on 11/20/2023

• How does this position fit into your life currently?
Currently, I am seeking a part-time position as a preschool teacher. I recently moved to the United States at the beginning of this year and worked as a preschool teacher until July. However, during that time, I made the decision to further my education. Now that I have completed my studies, I am eager to return to teaching and contribute my skills and experience as a part-time preschool teacher.

• What draws you to teach in a school like NKS?
I am particularly drawn to teaching at NKS because of the school's utilization of the Reggio Emilia teaching approach. This approach allows preschoolers to explore their interests and provides them with a wide range of choices. I have previously worked in a Reggio Emilia-inspired school, where I witnessed firsthand the positive impact of this teaching approach. The ability to collaborate with students and allow them to guide their learning journey through project-based learning experiences was gratifying and fulfilling.

• What do you like best about working with the elementary school age range?
Working with elementary school-age children is invigorating. Their energy and enthusiasm keep me motivated and engaged in the classroom. Additionally, their increased independence allows for more interactive and dynamic learning experiences. Witnessing their growth and progress as they develop new skills and insights is incredibly rewarding.

• What do you like best about working with the preschool age range?
The preschool age range holds a special place in my heart. I am captivated by their boundless curiosity and vivid imaginations. Engaging with them feels like embarking on a mutual learning journey. Together, we explore and discover new concepts, fostering their sense of wonder and creativity. Witnessing their daily successes and receiving their genuine love and affection is both heartwarming and inspiring.

• What pay rate do you hope to earn for this position?
I have an expected pay rate of $23 per hour for this position.

• When would you be available to start?
I am available to start on November 20, 2023.

By stating that you are currently seeking a part-time position as a preschool teacher, you demonstrate how this position fits into your current life circumstances. Well done!

check my email:Hello, Charra

Thanks for reaching out, I’m still interested in this position, here are my answers to the questions. 

• How does this position fit into your life currently?
I recently moved to the United States earlier this year and had been working as a preschool teacher. However, I made the decision to further my education by going back to school. Currently, I am looking for a part-time position as a preschool teacher.

• What attracts you to teach in a school like NKS?
I am really attracted to NKS because it utilizes the Reggio Emilia teaching approach. This approach allows preschoolers to freely explore their interests and provides them with plenty of choices. I have previously worked in a school that was inspired by the Reggio Emilia approach, and I ‘ve seen the positive impact it had on the students. The ability to collaborate with students and guide their learning through project-based experiences was fulfilling.

• What do you enjoy most about working with elementary school-aged children?
Working with elementary school-aged children is very exciting. Their energy and enthusiasm keep me motivated and fully engaged in the classroom. I also appreciate their growing independence, as it allows for more interactive and dynamic learning experiences.

• What do you enjoy most about working with preschool-aged children?
I absolutely love the preschool age range. Their endless curiosity and imaginative minds captivate me. Together, we explore new things and nurture their sense of wonder and creativity. Seeing their daily achievements and experiencing their genuine love is heartwarming.


• What pay rate do you hope to earn for this position?
My expected pay is $23.

• When would you be available to start?
I am available to start on November 20, 2023.

Thank you for your time!
Feiyan Guo

Subject: Re: Application for [Position]

Dear Charra,

Thank you for reaching out. I'm delighted to express my continued interest in the [Position]. Please find below my responses to the questions you asked.

• How does this position fit into your life currently?
Having relocated to the United States earlier this year, I have been working as a preschool teacher. However, I recently made the decision to further my education by returning back to school. As a result, I am currently seeking a part-time position as a preschool teacher.

• What attracts you to teach in a school like NKS?
I am particularly drawn to NKS because it employs the Reggio Emilia teaching approach. This approach provides preschoolers with the freedom to explore their interests and offers them a plethora of choices. In my previous experience working in a school influenced by the Reggio Emilia approach, I witnessed the positive impact it had on the students. Collaborating with students and guiding their learning through project-based experiences was truly fulfilling.

• What do you enjoy most about working with elementary school-aged children?
Working with elementary school-aged children is always exhilarating. Their energy and enthusiasm continuously motivate me and keep me fully engaged in the classroom. I also appreciate the increasing independence they demonstrate, as it allows for more interactive and dynamic learning experiences.

• What do you enjoy most about working with preschool-aged children?
The preschool age range holds a special place in my heart. I am captivated by their boundless curiosity and imaginative minds. Together, we embark on exciting explorations, nurturing their sense of wonder and creativity. Witnessing their daily achievements and experiencing their genuine love is truly heartwarming.

• What pay rate do you hope to earn for this position?
I am seeking an expected pay rate of $23 per hour for this position.

• When would you be available to start?
I am available to start on November 20, 2023.

Thank you for considering my application. Should you require any further information or wish to schedule an interview, please do not hesitate to contact me. I appreciate your time and consideration.

Warm regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
